chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 34 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case For hearing of main case 12.10.2023 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>>...<<<<<<< Learned AAG Sindh submits that case for approval of LPR of the petitioner has been sent to the competent authority, which will be decided under the policy of first in and first out. Learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. However, in any case, the case of petitioner shall be decided in the above terms within a period of two months. Judge Judge ARBROHI
